content.en:
Knowing that there were higher-level talents on top of the copying talent, he naturally looked forward to upgrading the copying talent even more.

If the copying talent can be upgraded, his potential and future will be even more immeasurable.

"Maybe the Unsullied Abyss has a treasure that can help me copy my talent and upgrade!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he was going to search for more in the Unsullied Abyss, maybe one day he would be able to find such a treasure!

......

The Unsullied Abyss.

Ye Tian spent the rest of his endless years, just looking for treasures that could upgrade his copying talent.

He didn't go to a place where he was looking for resources, and if he didn't attract the copying talent, he would just leave.

In this way, it wouldn't take him too long to find the entire Innocent Abyss, and a hundred thousand primeval epochs would definitely be able to do it.

In the following years, Ye Tian was slowly looking for the Innocent Abyss, and he had to visit every place.

During this period, he naturally provoked many terrifying creatures comparable to the Origin Upper Realm of the Innocent Abyss, and was killed again and again.

However, he didn't care at all, if he was killed, then he would make another copy of the body and continue to explore.

In this way, one primeval epoch after another passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how many times his copy body had fallen, but he never gave up.

10,000 primeval eras!

20,000 primeval eras!

30,000 primeval eras!

Finally, after sixty thousand primeval eras, Ye Tian sensed an attraction in a certain area of the Innocent Abyss, which was a certain treasure that was attracting his copying talent.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He cautiously dived into the past.

Abrupt.

A black whirlpool emerged and sucked him straight in.

The next moment.

His body shattered and turned into nothingness.

......

Beyond the Innocent Abyss.

Ye Tian's other copy body frowned slightly.

"What a terrifying creature, kill me in seconds!"

From the discovery of the copy talent, the black vortex is a special creature, the Vortex Behemoth.

The strength of the Vortex Behemoth that attacked him was very strong, and it should be no less than that of an ordinary Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

He didn't rush into the area again, but went to investigate what it was.

Innocent Island.

Ye Tian inquired carefully here, and even bought some information, and finally knew where the area where the Vortex Behemoth was located.

"Black Tooth Mountain. "

This is the territory of the Vortex Behemoths.

The strength of the Vortex Behemoths may not be as good as the Innocent Demon Vine, but there are quite a few Vortex Behemoths, comparable to the Origin Upper Realm, there are dozens of them.

It can be said that Black Tooth Mountain is extremely terrifying, and the Origin Upper Realm does not dare to go there.

Knowing the strength of the whirlpool beasts in Black Tooth Mountain, Ye Tian naturally wouldn't be stupid enough to directly break into Black Tooth Mountain to seize that treasure.

He was not afraid of falling, but if he destroyed that treasure, he would die with remorse.

"I can only choose to copy a Vortex Behemoth from the Origin Middle Realm, and then infiltrate there as a Vortex Behemoth and bring that treasure out. "

It was the only good thing he could think of.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian approached the Black Tooth Mountain, looking for the Vortex Behemoth of the Origin Middle Realm.

After many attempts, he finally came across a vortex beast in the Origin Middle Realm.

......

"Copy the Vortex Behemoth!"

A vortex giant beast of the Origin Middle Realm was slowly copied out by Ye Tian.

Then, Ye Tian infiltrated the Black Tooth Mountain as the copy body of this vortex giant beast.

The Vortex Behemoth's replica body also has a copy talent mark, and it can also sense the location of that treasure.

He moved slowly, unnoticed by the other whirlpool beasts.

Gradually, he approached the treasure.

Finally, he came to the depths of the Black Tooth Mountain.

Here he saw the treasure.

It was a long fluorescent-colored vine, and it looked very extraordinary.

However, there are no whirlpool beasts guarding here.

"There is no Vortex Behemoth guarding it, which means that the Vortex Behemoth doesn't value this long vine. "

Ye Tian grabbed this long vine and gently pulled it away.

At this time, the other vortex beasts did not come to stop him, which made him breathe a sigh of relief.

If other whirlpool beasts try to stop it, it will be troublesome, and if you don't get it right, a battle will break out, causing this long vine to be destroyed.

Afterwards.

He slowly moved away, away from here, away from behind Black Tooth Mountain.

He gave this long vine to the real body copy body, and let the real body copy body leave the immaculate abyss.

Beyond the Innocent Abyss.

When Ye Tian came out of the Innocent Abyss, he breathed a sigh of relief.

At this point, he felt a little safer.

And then.

He quickly returned to Stormtooth Island.

Soon after, he returned to Wind Tooth Island and began refining the long fluorescent vine.

Rumble!!!!

This long vine was swallowed by Ye Tian in one gulp, and then refined it.

Suddenly, a wonderful energy poured into the copy talent.

Soon, the talent for copying began to metamorphose, and the pain struck.

However, he forcibly held back.

After a long time, the copy talent upgrade was completed.

"The replication talent upgrade has been successful, and it should be possible to copy the talent of the Innocent Demon Vine!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately afterward, he replaced all the other replica bodies, so that all the replica bodies were upgraded.

The Unsullied Abyss.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was close to the Innocent Demon Vine, ready to copy the talent of the Innocent Demon Vine.

Soon, he approached the Unsullied Demon Vine.

Rumble!!!!!

The Innocent Demon Vine sensed the approach of the outsider and shot directly.

Burst!

One of the vines of the Innocent Demon Vine directly penetrated Ye Tian's body, killing Ye Tian in an instant.

However, Ye Tian still managed to spy on and copy the talent of the Innocent Demon Vine.

Ancestral Fu of the Other Side: Piercing

Ancestral Endowment on the Other Side: Life Regeneration

"The talent above the primeval-level ancestral endowment-the other side level ancestral endowment, the Innocent Demon Vine directly has two, no wonder it is so powerful!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian copied and fused these two other-level ancestral endowments and became his other-level ancestral endowments.

"The Innocent Abyss is not only these two Peer-level Ancestral Endowments, the other top overlord creatures of the Innocent Abyss all have Other-Shore Ancestral Endowments, and I have copied all of their Other-Shore Ancestral Endowments. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's copied bodies to approach these top overlords one by one, although they were killed every time, they also copied one after another other-level ancestral endowment.

As his other-level ancestral endowment increases, his potential and foundation are increasing.

And soon, he discovered another benefit of the other side level ancestral endowment, which was the real opportunity.
